initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_marvel
FROM superhero
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
WHERE superhero.height_cm >= 150 AND superhero.height_cm <= 180;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS marvel_percentage
FROM superhero
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
WHERE superhero.height_cm >= 150 AND superhero.height_cm <= 180;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_marvel
FROM 
    superhero
JOIN 
    publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
WHERE 
    superhero.height_cm >= 150 
    AND superhero.height_cm <= 180;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_marvel
FROM superhero
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
WHERE superhero.height_cm >= 150 AND superhero.height_cm <= 180;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_marvel
FROM 
    superhero
JOIN 
    publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
WHERE 
    superhero.height_cm >= 150 
    AND superhero.height_cm <= 180;
